summary: The docs-only contract and GH-41 Loom carrier stay within the allowed Harbor lane scope and do not touch runtime/provider code.
reviewed_validation_summary: Local validation passed for git diff --check, JSON syntax, Loom fact-chain with absolute target, Loom suite validate, and Loom suite carrier validate. Loom doctor/verify blocked on workstation installed-state v2 / legacy surface, classified as environment/tooling blocker.
follow_ups: Do not treat this approval as runtime/provider implementation, API schema, browser skeleton, hosted runtime, provider evaluation, browser smoke, evidence store, or issue closeout completion.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: ADR 0006 covers provider_ref, profile_ref, execution_identity_ref, fact source categories, observed fact vs provider claim, license/binary/secret/profile data boundaries, Runtime Session lifecycle relationship, research absorption decisions, and non-goals for GH-40/GH-41/GH-42/GH-43.

consumed_inputs.validation: git diff --check; JSON syntax via jq empty; loom fact-chain with absolute target; loom suite validate --item GH-41; loom suite carrier validate --item GH-41; loom doctor/verify blocked by local install-surface state
